title: Financial Management AI
summary: An intelligent financial analysis and knowledge-augmentation system for personal investment research.
content: Combines market data, financial indicators, news and filings, and a personal investment knowledge base. Multi-model agents, OCR, and vector retrieval produce traceable structured analysis, risk signals, and research support.
capabilities: Multi-source market-data ingestion, cleaning, and scheduled synchronization
OCR knowledge-base processing, semantic retrieval, and vector storage
AI agent tool calls and structured investment-analysis reports

children.name: backend-java
children.detail: Spring Boot, Spring AI, access control, business orchestration, and a data gateway

children.name: ai-python
children.detail: LangGraph agents, OCR, embeddings, vector retrieval, and asynchronous workers

children.name: frontend-vue
children.detail: Vue 3 administration, market dashboards, knowledge bases, and AI analysis views

children.name: database
children.detail: PostgreSQL, pgvector, InfluxDB, and data-migration scripts

children.name: docker
children.detail: Docker Compose service orchestration and local deployment configuration

title: Urban Sidequest
summary: An AI-assisted route decision system for urban exploration.
content: Built on city maps and real POI data, it combines staged candidate retrieval, preference modelling, and route ranking to generate executable, explainable, and adjustable exploration routes.
capabilities: Multi-source POI semantic retrieval and quality filtering
Route preference learning and multi-objective ranking
Explainable route generation with dynamic alternatives

children.name: POI Retrieval
children.detail: Multi-source place retrieval, semantic mapping, and candidate compression

children.name: Route Preference Model
children.detail: Route-quality learning and ranking from preference data

children.name: Route Decision Engine
children.detail: Primary and alternative route generation, explanation, and adjustment

children.name: Android Experience
children.detail: Map selection, route presentation, execution, and check-in feedback

children.name: Backend Services
children.detail: Route orchestration, data services, and a training-data feedback loop
